feat.name: Inked Panoply
feat.text: Your tattoos can briefly animate and extend from your skin, granting you a spectral shieldbearer who protects you from harm. Doing so expends one use of your storied skin, granting you a +1 circumstance bonus to AC against the triggering attack. In addition, you gain resistance to mental, spirit, and void damage equal to twice your number of tattooed historian feats against the triggering attack.

traits.name: Uncommon
traits.text: Something of uncommon rarity requires special training or comes from a particular culture or part of the world. Some character choices give access to uncommon options, and the GM can choose to allow access for anyone. Less is known about uncommon creatures than common creatures. They typically can't be summoned. The DC of Recall Knowledge checks related to these creature is increased by 2.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.

feat.trigger: A creature targets you with an attack, and you can see the attacker.
